steps.description: The student opens the battery door.
The student exchanges the battery from the GoPro.
The student opens the battery door.
The student exchanges the SD card from the GoPro.
The student turns on the GoPro.
The student turns off the GoPro.
The student assembles the strap on the GoPro.
The student disassembles the strap from the GoPro.
The student aligns the handheld grip on the mount.
The student screws the lock screw on the mount.
The student disassembles the handheld grip from the GoPro.
The student unscrews the lock screw from the tripod.
The student assembles the tripod on the mount.
The student disassembles the tripod from the GoPro.
